gaps.requirement: Cashu ecash protocol integration — privacy-preserving tokens backed by Lightning Network payments (NUTs specification)
gaps.current_state: No source code, configuration, or dependency files exist. The entire Cashu integration is unbuilt.

gaps.requirement: L402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required) authentication — macaroon-based API access gating with Lightning invoices
gaps.current_state: No source code, configuration, or dependency files exist. The entire L402 protocol implementation is unbuilt.

gaps.requirement: Integration layer combining Cashu ecash tokens with L402 authentication for privacy-preserving API monetization
gaps.current_state: No source code exists. The core value proposition — using Cashu tokens instead of direct Lightning invoices for L402 auth — has not been started.

gaps.requirement: Project scaffolding — package manifest, dependency declarations, build configuration, entry point
gaps.current_state: No package.json, pyproject.toml, go.mod, Cargo.toml, or any project manifest exists. No language or framework has been chosen.

gaps.requirement: README.md and project documentation describing features, usage, and API
gaps.current_state: No README.md or any documentation files exist outside the .overnight orchestration directory.

gaps.requirement: Test suite with coverage for core functionality
gaps.current_state: No test files of any kind exist.

context.recommendation: This is a completely empty greenfield project. No source code, documentation, configuration, or dependency files exist — only the .overnight orchestration infrastructure. Before any gap analysis is meaningful, the project needs: (1) Choose a language/framework (TypeScript with cashu-ts, Python with nutshell, or Go/Rust for performance), (2) Initialize project scaffolding (package manifest, entry point, basic structure), (3) Implement core Cashu ecash token handling, (4) Implement L402 macaroon-based authentication flow, (5) Build the integration layer combining both protocols. All 4 P0 gaps are blocking because nothing can function until the project is actually started.
